name: icons
description: SVG icon asset library providing hundreds of icon components for use with the uikit Icon component.
when_to_use: SVG icon asset library providing hundreds of icon components for use with the uikit Icon component
avoid: Not for illustrations or marketing images — use @gravity-ui/illustrations. Icons are SVG data, not self-contained visual components.
not_for: Not for illustrations or marketing images — use @gravity-ui/illustrations. Icons are SVG data, not self-contained visual components.
